meta.name: жҫіжҙІз¶ӯжёҜ Victoria HongKongers
meta.about: We are a group of Hong Kongers living in Victoria, who are gravely concerned with the situation at home in Hong Kong since June 2019. We volunteer to support Hong KongвҖҷs democracy movement and вҖӢHongkongers who newly arrived to settle in Victoria.

meta.name: жҫіжҙІз¶ӯжёҜ Victoria Hongkongers Association (AU) Inc.
meta.about: We're a group of Hongkongers who volunteer to grow the dispora and help the newly arrived hkers to settle in Victoria (Australia).
